title: NVlabs/ProtoMotions
abstract:
ProtoMotions is a GPU-accelerated simulation and learning framework for training physically simulated digital humans and humanoid robots.

# ProtoMotions 3 **A GPU-Accelerated Framework for Simulated Humanoids** [ ](LICENSE.md) [ ](https://protomotions.github.io/) [ ](https://github.com/newton-physics/newton/commit/e7a737c) [ ](https://github.com/isaac-sim/IsaacLab/releases/tag/v2.3.0) [ ](https://developer.nvidia.com/isaac-gym) [ ](https://github.com/Genesis-Embodied-AI/Genesis) [ ](https://github.com/google-deepmind/mujoco) [ ](https://deepwiki.com/NVlabs/ProtoMotions) (unverified AI generation) --- ## Overview **ProtoMotions3** is a GPU-accelerated simulation and learning framework for training physically simulated digital humans and humanoid robots. Our mission is to provide a **fast prototyping platform** for various simulated humanoid learning tasks and environments—for researchers and practitioners in **animation**, **robotics**, and **reinforcement learning**—bridging efforts across communities. **Modularity**, **extensibility**, and **scalability** are at the core of ProtoMotions3. It is **community-driven** and permissively licensed under the [Apache-2.0 license](LICENSE.md). Also check out **[MimicKit](https://github.com/xbpeng/MimicKit/tree/main)**, our sibling repository for a lightweight framework for motion imitation learning. --- ## What You Can Do with ProtoMotions3 ### 🏃 Large-Scale Motion Learning Train your fully physically simulated character to learn motion skills from the entire public [**AMASS**](https://amass.is.tue.mpg.de/) human animation dataset (**40+ hours**) within **12 hours** on 4 A100s. ### 📈 Scalable Multi-GPU Training Scale training to even larger datasets with each GPU handling a subset of motions. For example, we have trained with **24 A100s** with **13K motions** on each GPU with the [**BONES**](https://huggingface.co/datasets/bones-studio/seed) dataset in [**SOMA**](https://github.com/NVlabs/SOMA-X) skeleton format. Check out [Quick Start](https://protomotions.github.io/getting_started/quickstart.html) and [SEED BVH Data Preparation](https://protomotions.github.i
abstract_zh: ProtoMotions是一个GPU加速的仿真与学习框架，用于训练物理仿真的数字人和类人机器人。其核心目标是提供一个快速原型开发平台，支持多种仿真类人学习任务和环境，服务于动画、机器人学和强化学习领域的研究者与从业者，并促进跨社区合作。该框架强调模块化、可扩展性和可伸缩性，采用社区驱动模式，并基于Apache-2.0许可证开源。用户可在4块A100 GPU上，于12小时内从完整的AMASS人体动画数据集（超过40小时）中训练出具备运动技能的物理仿真角色。此外，框架支持多GPU可扩展训练，例如使用24块A100 GPU，每块处理BONES数据集中的13000个动作。
tldr_zh: GPU加速框架，12小时内从40+小时数据训练物理仿真数字人
cover_zh: 12小时搞定40小时动作数据｜这个GPU框架让数字人训练快得离谱

judge.reason: GPU加速的人形机器人仿真与学习框架，支持大规模运动学习，官方出品，高影响力。
